race.comment: TAMBELOA (3) raced in tougher company and won't know himself today with the 52.5kg after the claim. Just over a month between runs with a fast finishing fourth over 1600m at this track with the 57kg. Gets the right setup out to his right trip. Can hold a forward position and give plenty of cheek. THE IRON STAR (10) improving gelding who deserves his chance in town after defeating a handy field from the wide gate with the 59kg over this trip at Hawkesbury in C1 grade. Can race closer from the gate and no shock to see him take stopping in this company at the good odds. SACRIFY (1) big improver with the track bias along the inside when he saluted over 1800m at Rosehill in this grade. Can carry the extra weight from the inside gate and take a hand in the finish. CELEBRITY (7) failed to keep his unbeaten record intact first-up when snagged back from the wide draw to finish eighth over 1600m at this track. Improver. EXISTENTIAL BOB (4) finds it hard to win and place best with the claim.
